themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Verse 5 describes Moses's final warning about midnight judgment. God Himself will pass throug...". Word-study detail reinforces "כִּסְא֔וֹ: upon his throne - properly, covered, i.e., a throne (as canopied)".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "בְּרַגְלֶ֔יךָ: that follow - a foot (as used in walking); by implication, a step; by euphemis...".
